name: api-resource-with-eloquent-relationships
description: Validate that the skill produces a correct Laravel API Resource backed by Eloquent relationships with eager loading and proper JSON structure.
prompt: Create a Laravel 11 API resource for an Order model that belongs to a Customer and has many OrderItems. Each OrderItem belongs to a Product. Return nested JSON with customer name, order total, and line items with product name and quantity. Include the controller, resource classes, and route registration.

assertions.description: Must use Laravel API Resource (JsonResource) for response shaping.
Must eager-load relationships using with() to prevent N+1 queries.
Must define belongsTo relationship on the Order model for Customer.
Must define hasMany relationship on the Order model for OrderItems.
Must include route registration for the API resource endpoint.

name: queue-based-job-processing
description: Validate that the skill produces a robust queued job with retry logic, backoff, failure handling, and event-driven dispatch.
prompt: Create a Laravel 11 queued job that processes a payment via a third-party API. The job should have exponential backoff, a maximum of 5 retries, a failed() method that notifies an admin, and be dispatched from a PaymentController after an order is created. Include the event/listener pattern for triggering post-payment side effects.

assertions.description: Must implement ShouldQueue interface for async queue processing.
Must define backoff strategy (exponential or array-based) for retry delays.
Must implement failed() method for handling permanent job failures.
Must dispatch the job from the controller or service layer.
Must use event dispatch for post-payment side effects decoupled from the job.
